name: The Soul-Weaver's Loom
description: Extract a memory trapped in the magical fabric by forcing a structural tear.

flaws.name: Tangle White Thread
flaws.flavor_text: Tangle the white-thread spools, disrupting the loom's feeding mechanism.

flaws.name: Maximize Tension Motor
flaws.flavor_text: Over-crank the tension motor. Due to the tangles, tension increases exponentially.

flaws.name: Snap Thread
flaws.flavor_text: Trigger a hard snap. The loom compensates by creating a structural void, letting you pull the memory free.
